defaults.actionHelp: "Apply a force to an actor for a specified duration."

"Fades the view. Does not finish until the fade is completed."
"Creates a new watcher and puts it in the scripts watcher list"
"Removes the target Actor from the game"
"Disables a watcher in a given script"
"Displays a temporary message on the screen for debugging purposes"
"Enable or disable a HavokForceActor.  When a HavokForceActor is disabled it will never apply any forces, even if triggered."
"Enables a watcher in a given script"
"Ends execution of the current loop. Does nothing if no loop is running"
"Ends execution of a script"
"Executes a list of actions n times."
"Freezes a Havok Actor in place.  This only works for Actors that exist in Havok.  This is intended to keep physics objects in place so they don't move, it will not put an AI into the frozen state."
"Returns the label of the current level."
"Gets a value from the message that triggered the script"
"Returns the value of a given object's property"
"Hides or unhides an actor"
"If one of the boolean statements in the 'testsOr' array is true, executes the Actions in 'trueActions', else executes the Actions in 'elseActions'."
"Outputs to the Unreal log file. Use [<varname>] to output variables, i.e. 'The value of MyCounter is [MyCounter]'"
"Continually loop over loopActions until ActionExitLoop is executed."

"Opens a menu"

"Returns the result of the addition of one variable to another"

"Assigns one variable to another, but only if the variable did not exist and had to be created."
"Subtracts 1 from the variable"
"Returns the result of the division of one variable with another"
"Adds 1 to the variable"
"Returns the result of the multiplication of one variable with another"
"Returns the result of the subtraction of one variable from another"
"Suspends this script for n seconds"

"Returns the result of a logical evaluation"
"Returns the result of a logical not operation"
"Returns the result of a logical or operation"

defaults.Description: "Unlock a PLASMID SLOT.\\n\\nPlasmids give you incredible powers, and more slots allow you to use more of them."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "When just yelling GET BACK isn't working, it's nice to have some repelling force to back up your request. Sonic Boom -- when push comes to shove."
defaults.Description: "Hurls creatures and objects BACK with a BLAST of force."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "A staple in the HackSmart line of gene tonics, Alarm Expert uses your body's electrochemical composition to defuse circuitry alarms in secure systems. Try it today!"
defaults.Description: "2 fewer ALARM tiles when HACKING."
"Item Description Not Yet Configured In Weapons.ini for this Ammunition"
defaults.FriendlyName: "The 'FriendlyName' field needs to be configured in Weapons.ini for this Ammunition"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Useful in any hazardous situation, Armored Shell offers fantastic protection against life's bumps and bruises. Don't be a softie -- use Armored Shell now!"
defaults.Description: "Reduces all physical damage."

"Inventable Item: 4 Rubber Hose, 4 Battery, 1 Brass Tube\\n\\n Automatic Hack Tools allow anyone, no matter how unskilled, to hack electronic devices.  Unfortunately they short out after only a single use."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Developed for use in today's uncertain environment, ENRAGE! will make your victim forget what side he's on, and attack anyone nearby. Just make sure 'anyone' isn't you!"
defaults.Description: "ENRAGES target, causing it to attack someone other than you."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "In today's genetic wonderland, you probably feel like there's never enough EVE at hand. With EVE Saver, your EVE will go farther than ever before!"
defaults.Description: "Plasmids use less EVE."
"An EVE hypo immediately restores your EVE to your current maximum capacity."
"Increase your Maximum EVE"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Bloodlust heals your body and your mind as you swing! Be red in tooth and claw -- with Bloodlust!"
defaults.Description: "You gain small amounts of HEALTH and EVE when inflicting damage with the WRENCH."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Take full advantage of Rapture's distilleries and vintners. Drink to your health, with Booze Hound!"
defaults.Description: "Drinking ALCOHOL restores a small amount of EVE, rather than draining it."
"This organ is mysterious in its function.  Perhaps if you research the Spider Splicer, you'll learn more about it."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Need some peace and quiet? Splice in Natural Camouflage, stop moving, and just fade away. Remember, not seeing is believing!"
defaults.Description: "When STANDING STILL, you become INVISIBLE."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Ryan Industries introduces the latest in wartime deterrent genetics. Static Discharge makes you a walking Tesla Coil, zapping anything and everything foolish enough to strike you. Feel safe, be safe with Static Discharge."
defaults.Description: "You emit a burst of ELECTRICITY when struck, damaging all around you."

"Inventable Item: 3 Distilled Water, 2 Battery, 1 Alcohol\\n\\nElectric Gel for the chemical thrower.\\n\\nElectric Gel deals electric damage to targets, and may send them into shocked convulsions.  Also good for temporarily disabling machines."
"Napalm for the chemical thrower.\\n\\nNapalm is particularly effective against targets vulnerable to fire, and will set things on fire if continuously applied."
"Liquid nitrogen for the chemical thrower.\\n\\nLiquid Nitrogen is particularly effective against targets vulnerable to cold, and will freeze creatures if continuously applied."

defaults.HackingSuccessFeedbackText: "RESULT OF SUCCESSFUL HACK:  Inventions require fewer components."

defaults.Description: "Steel-Tip Bolts for the crossbow.\\n\\nThese bolts fly true even at long ranges."
"Incendiary Bolts for the crossbow.\\n\\nThese bolts are particularly effective against targets vulnerable to fire."
"Inventable Item: 2 Battery, 3 Glue, 1 Alcohol\\n\\nTripwire bolts for the crossbow.\\n\\nThese ingenious bolts shoot out an electrified tripwire when fired into a wall."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Enemies on your back? Distract their attention with a helpful decoy. They take the heat...so you don't have to!"
defaults.Description: "Creates a DECOY that draws attacks away from you."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Get more bang for your Research buck with Damage Research. Carry your analysis further than you ever thought possible!"
defaults.Description: "Increases DAMAGE bonuses gained from RESEARCH."

defaults.HackingSuccessFeedbackText: "Successfully hacking this door will unlock it."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "U-Invent Stations truly are a marvel of modern engineering, and now you'll need fewer raw materials to make what you want. It's not witchcraft -- it's Clever Inventor!"
defaults.Description: "INVENTING items requires 1 fewer of each COMPONENT (minimum of 1)."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Supercharge your body with Electric Flesh, the ultimate in electricity enhancements. Insulate yourself from harm with new EF!"
defaults.Description: "You take less DAMAGE from ELECTRICITY.\\nYou deal more DAMAGE when you use ELECTRICAL attacks."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Don't be a dolt -- use Electro Bolt!"
defaults.Description: "A bolt of ELECTRICITY that STUNS both man and machine.\\nDEVASTATING against enemies in WATER."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Another favorite in the HackSmart line of gene tonics, Focused Hacker defuses overload traps in secure systems. Fewer fried circuits guaranteed or your money back!"
defaults.Description: "2 fewer OVERLOAD tiles when HACKING."
"Unlock an ENGINEERING TONIC SLOT.\\n\\nEngineering Tonics improve your ability to HACK or use machines, and more Slots allow you to use more of them."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Shutdown Expert gives you more freedom from odious security systems, once you've hacked into their controls.  Now you see them, now they don't!"
defaults.Description: "HACKED TURRETS and CAMERAS remain hacked for an additional minute."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Every research photographer wants an edge, and Photographer's Eye is yours. Once you've spliced this invaluable gene tonic, you'll get the picture!"
defaults.Description: "Increases RESEARCH scores from taking pictures."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "In today's dangerous times, it never hurts to be a little faster, a little quicker on the draw. Remember, you don't have to outrun the crazed Splicer -- just your neighbor!"
defaults.Description: "You MOVE and swing the WRENCH FASTER."
"Film for the research camera.\\n\\nEach unit of film is good for a single research photograph."

defaults.HackOnlyVendingItemDescription: "(The machine must be hacked to access this item)"
defaults.StackSizeVendingItemDescription: "(You cannot carry any more of this item)"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Leave your foes out in the cold with Frozen Field!"
defaults.Description: "You take less DAMAGE from COLD and can FREEZE enemies when you hit them with the WRENCH."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "With Hacker's Delight, your body converts the altered current from a hacked machine into a powerful healing agent. Hack and heal!"
defaults.Description: "Every time you HACK something, you gain a little HEALTH and EVE."
"Fragmentation grenades for the grenade launcher.\\n\\nThese basic frag grenades are massively damaging, and have a significant blast radius."

"Inventable Item: 3 Distilled Water, 2 Kerosene, 1 Brass Tube\\n\\nHeat-seeking RPGs for the grenade launcher.\\n\\nThese homing missiles are the perfect solution for moving targets, delivering a devastating payload even around corners!"
"Proximity mines for the grenade launcher.\\n\\nThese are effectively used as land-mines, staying primed and ready until an unwitting victim walks too close."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "The original HackSmart gene tonic, Hacking Expert defuses alarms and helps avoid overloads. It's the must-have Plasmid of the HackSmart line."
defaults.Description: "1 fewer ALARM tile and 1 fewer OVERLOAD tile when HACKING."

defaults.HackingSuccessFeedbackText: "RESULT OF SUCCESSFUL HACK:  Cost reduced, and enemies who use it will take damage."

defaults.Description: "Increase your Maximum Health"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Extra Nutrition boosts your body's natural ability to turn food into renewed vitality."
defaults.Description: "You gain a little extra HEALTH from SNACKS and BANDAGES."

defaults.actionHelp: "Hide the needle HUD element for the boss fight"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Don't get caught without this powerful self-defense tool at the ready. Give your foes the cold shoulder with Winter Blast!"
defaults.Description: "Freeze your foes in place. Shatter them into a thousand pieces! What's not to like?"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Incineration: when it absolutely positively has to erupt in flames, don't wait -- Incinerate!"
defaults.Description: "Sets objects and creatures ON FIRE.  Repeated use to increase the pain! Ages 12 and up."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Nothing clears a room like swarms of stinging hornets. (Warning: not recommended for users with allergies.)"
defaults.Description: "Releases a swarm of stinging INSECTS that ATTACK multiple enemies."

defaults.InventoryStackFullMessage: "You cannot carry any more of item: %s."

defaults.Description: "Item Description Not Yet Configured In Inventory.ini for this Item"
defaults.FriendlyName: "The 'FriendlyName' field needs to be configured in Inventory.ini for this Item"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "In today's automated environment, you may find yourself up against hostiles not made of flesh and blood. Machine Buster gives you the edge you've been looking for against metal-plated antagonists."
defaults.Description: "Increases DAMAGE you deal to CAMERAS, BOTS and TURRETS."

"Inventable Item: 2 Kerosene, 3 Shell Casing, 1 Brass Tube\\n\\n.45 caliber armor-piercing rounds for the machine gun.\\n\\nThese bullets are particularly effective against metal or armored targets, like turrets, security bots and Big Daddies."
".45 caliber rounds for the machine gun.\\n\\nThese bullets will do the job you want, if the job is spraying death at your opponents."
".45 caliber antipersonnel rounds for the machine gun.  These bullets are specially designed to neutralize non-armored targets -- like Splicers."
"A first aid kit contains a variety of healing agents designed to regenerate tissue at the genetic level.  "

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Get more out of your First Aid Kits with EVE Link. This revolutionary new gene tonic causes your body to produce EVE whenever you use First Aid Kits."
defaults.Description: "FIRST AID Kits also give you EVE."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "With Medical Expert, your First Aid Kits will go farther, healing sickness and injury at a rate you're sure to find astonishing. Don't use a First Aid Kit without your best friend, Medical Expert!"
defaults.Description: "FIRST AID Kits give you slightly more HEALTH."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Wrench Jockey bulks up your upper body, allowing you to wield club-like weapons with unprecedented skill and power!"
defaults.Description: "Increases WRENCH damage."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Has a rival faction set up Security Cameras and Turrets where you need to go? Security Evasion adjusts the thermal signature of your epidermal layer, confusing cameras and turrets and delaying their response."
defaults.Description: "SECURITY CAMERAS and TURRETS take longer to SEE you."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "There's a lot to carry around in this world, and we're here to help!  Organic Pockets literally creates stretchy folds in your epidermis capable of storing almost anything you can think of.  Carry the day with Organic Pockets!"
defaults.Description: "Lets you carry more ammo, hypos, first aid kits and other stuff."
"Unlock a PHYSICAL TONIC SLOT.\\n\\nPhysical Tonics make you stronger and more powerful and more Slots allow you to use more of them."

"Inventable Item: 2 Rubber Hose, 3 Shell Casing, 1 Steel Screw\\n\\n .38 caliber antipersonnel rounds for the pistol.\\n\\nThese bullets are specially designed to neutralize non-armored targets -- like Splicers."
".38 cailber armor-piercing rounds for the pistol.\\n\\nThese bullets are particularly effective against metal or armored targets, like turrets, security bots and Big Daddies."
"These .38 caliber rounds for the pistol are a reliable way to deal damage to almost anything."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Inventing is already a valuable pastime in the resource-strapped halls of Rapture. Make yourself a Prolific Inventor and you'll be the envy of your peers, as you turn worthless junk into valuable commodities."
defaults.Description: "Whenever you INVENT an item you get TWICE AS MANY as normal."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Are those pesky security cameras getting you down? Simply tag your enemies with our photoelectric insects and those cameras and turrets become your best friend. Splice Security Bullseye today!"
defaults.Description: "Creatures hit by this will be attacked by CAMERAS and TURRETS."

defaults.HackingSuccessFeedbackText: "RESULT OF SUCCESSFUL HACK: Safe becomes unlocked."
"RESULT OF SUCCESSFUL HACK: Security systems temporarily disabled."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "A new offering in the HackSmart line, Security Expert was designed for the Hacker specializing in disabling electronic security measures. You won't be secure without Security Expert!"
defaults.Description: "Reduces DIFFICULTY when HACKING turrets, bots and cameras."

defaults.UsedFeedbackTextDormant: "You have already used this machine. It cannot be used again."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "What sound is more ominous than a yammering security alarm? With Shorten Alarms spliced, your personal EM signature becomes altered to interact uniquely with alarm sensors, shortening the period until you'll be free and clear."
defaults.Description: "Reduces DURATION of camera ALARMS."
"Standard buckshot for the shotgun.\\n\\nThis basic buckshot for the shotgun provides a devastating blast at short range."

"Inventable Item: 3 Kerosene, 2 Shell Casing, 1 Steel Screw\\n\\nExplosive buckshot for the shotgun.\\n\\nThis powerful buckshot explodes on contact with a target, dealing extra damage to all targets."
"Electric Buckshot for the shotgun.\\n\\nElectric buckshot is particularly effective against targets vulnerable to electricity."

defaults.actionHelp: "Show the needle HUD element for the boss fight"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "The most popular of the HackSmart line, Speedy Hacker buys you the time you need to Hack any electronic device. Time is on YOUR side with Speedy Hacker!"
defaults.Description: "Reduces FLOW SPEED when HACKING."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "When fighting those stronger or faster than yourself, you'll need every advantage possible in a scrum. Wrench Lurker allows you to make the most of your opportunities when your antagonist is caught off-guard."
defaults.Description: "Quiets your footsteps, and increases DAMAGE from melee attacks on UNAWARE opponents"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Teach your enemies a lesson they'll never forget with Cyclone Trap from Ryan Industries. (Ryan Industries is not liable for damage done to ceiling fans, chandeliers, or other ceiling fixtures.)"
defaults.Description: "Launches Splicers into the air- and hurts them badly on the way down!"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "One of HackSmart's more popular offerings, Safecracker lets you into places that THEY want to keep you out of. Splice it now, and get Hacking!"
defaults.Description: "Reduces DIFFICULTY when HACKING SAFES and COMBO LOCKS."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Need a bodyguard in a pinch? Our new Hypnotize plasmid will fool a Big Daddy into protecting you as if you were its own Little Sister."
defaults.Description: "Causes a BIG DADDY to PROTECT YOU for a BRIEF TIME."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Human Inferno -- the hottest Plasmid in Rapture!"
defaults.Description: "You take less DAMAGE from FIRE and inflict more DAMAGE when you use FIRE."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Pick up big stuff with your mind. Throw them at your enemies. What else do you need to know?"
defaults.Description: "PULLS an object to you, then HURLS it (even enemy grenades!).\\nAlso useful for holding objects as a SHIELD or grabbing objects OUT OF REACH."

defaults.FlavorDescription: "Splicing Scrounger is like having a sixth sense. You'll spot things you'd otherwise miss and discover things you'd otherwise leave behind. With Scrounger, you'll swear you have X-Ray vision!"
defaults.Description: "When SEARCHING containers or corpses, you can search again to get DIFFERENT LOOT."

defaults.actionDisplayName: "A condition that affect knowledge of a concept"
"Show a training message when concept knowledge reaches a threshold"
defaults.actionHelp: "When the knowledge level of a concept reaches a pre-set level, show a training message"

defaults.FlavorDescription: "With the Vending Expert plasmid altering your EM signature, you can fool the pricing circuits at any vending machine. Known to our customers as \"Circus Maximus,\" Vending Expert will pay for itself in no time!"
defaults.Description: "Reduces PRICES in VENDING Machines."

defaults.HackingSuccessFeedbackText: "RESULT OF SUCCESSFUL HACK:  More items available, and all prices reduced."
"Succesfully hacking this station will cause all upgrades to be cheaper."

defaults.Description: "Unlock a COMBAT TONIC SLOT.\\n\\nCombat Tonics help you deal and resist damage, and more Slots allow you to use more of them."

defaults.actionHelp: "Set Quest Hint."
